summary: `ee/api/agentic_provisioning/views.py:_error_response` is not verifiable in v1: Scoped source uses logging side effect (`\blogger\.(warning|info|error|debug|exception)\b`); Scoped source uses Django REST framework Response (`\bResponse\s*\(`); PR description suggests observability/logging intent (`\blogging\b`).
